name: The Ashfield
description: A vast plain of volcanic ash and black rock. Nothing grows here naturally, but the soil beneath the ash is the richest in the world — those who dig deep enough find it. The Ashfield is where The Burn and The Deep argue: fire meets stone, and the land can't decide which one won.
atmosphere: Grey dust, sulfur smell, distant vents of steam, black rock that cuts bare feet, silence so complete you hear your own blood
